execution_milestone_description: Broker/exchange fill provenance and contract-note/cost reconciliation prerequisites.
top_required_next_evidence: Capture or import broker/exchange order/fill events and reconcile lifecycle states to those records where available.

execution_milestone_description: Close unsupported or partial strategy feature, module and registry coverage before acceptance reruns.
top_required_next_evidence: Implement missing required features/modules or explicitly classify the strategy as research-only before predictive promotion.

execution_milestone_description: Produce calibrated predictive outputs and baseline/holdout/falsification evidence.
top_required_next_evidence: Run calibrated predictive validation and require positive accuracy/Brier skill versus no-skill and local-majority baselines.

execution_milestone_description: Run full seed, walk-forward, parameter-neighborhood, execution-profile and negative-control robustness tests.
top_required_next_evidence: Execute the Phase 13 seed plan and walk-forward windows for predictive models without test reuse.

execution_milestone_description: Run full event/lifecycle risk, guardrail, slippage, tail-risk and risk-adjusted economic acceptance replays.
top_required_next_evidence: Run the full event/tick lifecycle engine for every supported strategy/profile/fill model with preserved order and fill lineage.

execution_milestone_description: Rerun strategies on holdout generator profiles, feed imperfections, pessimistic execution and artifact controls.
top_required_next_evidence: Run strategies on holdout-generator outputs and compare against calibration/development results.

execution_milestone_description: Validate surviving candidates on diagnostically sound multi-day real data holdouts.
top_required_next_evidence: Run economic validation on multi-day real data and/or untouched holdout-generator configurations before promotion.
